events.description: Scene 1 begins — DNS acronym letters start appearing
Letter D scales in with spring pop
Letter N scales in
Letter S scales in
Word 'Domain' fades in under D
Word 'Name' fades in under N
Word 'System' fades in under S
Phonebook metaphor card slides up with book icon
'of the internet' subtitle appears
Crossfade from Scene 1 to Scene 2
Scene 2 — browser window appears with slide up
Browser window mock with address bar fades in
Typing 'google.com' into address bar starts
Computer icon slides in from right
Question marks float up from computer — confusion
'Only understands' warning + IP address block appears
IP number 142.250.80.46 scales in with spring + glow
Crossfade from Scene 2 to Scene 3
Scene 3 — 'DNS Translates' title with translate icon
Human-readable side slides in from left (google.com)
Machine-readable side slides in from right (142.250.80.46)
Center arrow icon fades in, color morphs blue → green
